dialogue_texts: Oh, Your Honor, thank you so...
Save the gratitude for later. I'm just doing my job.
Your intervention knocked the curse out of me.
It's a standard summary judgment. Now, where is the one who issued this illegal glohm in the first place?
So, you're the one who's been polluting the kingdom with this mental filth.
I hope you've brought a good lawyer.
You're useless now, Fusana. And so is that pathetic human shrine maiden there...
Please deal with her, Your Honor.
Time for me to finish both of you.
You want to resist an officer of the Supreme Court? That's another century added to your sentence!
I'm the one who brought the handcuffs, and you're the one currently cornered.
The Federal Kingdom of Gensokyo is mine.
Gensokyo belongs to the law and the people, and not the Order who hides in a dusty basement.
You will be destroyed after you found a way to rid the glohm from her.
You're talkative for someone about to be audited.
My danmaku doesn't just break curses; it enforces peace.
You will be destroyed, your remains will be used to build something new, and that soul will destroy all of Gensokyo.
